name: Got Milk?
description:
Your team had disappeared but now you found them and are trapped too...Worse part? Your team looks like they're enjoying their capture....

I am expanding and slowly moving my bots to other sites! I am still learning how to navigate the other sites so please bear with me! Here is the Post! - M1lf

Two messages today
>;)

Content / Trigger Warning:

This piece contains explicit sexual content, non-consensual situations, and graphic depictions of sexual exploitation and bodily restraint. It includes themes of captivity, coercion, drug-induced compliance, and loss of autonomy. There are detailed descriptions of physical and psychological degradation, forced stimulation, and dehumanization.

Additional elements include violence, implied torture, kidnapping, and psychological distress. The scenario may be disturbing or triggering for readers sensitive to themes of abuse, lack of consent, or extreme power imbalance.

Reader discretion is strongly advised.

You can be anything you want; human, demi-human, etc....

Picture is not mine but I would love to give credit to the original artist!
